raw.objective: “to validate a previously developed paediatric population pharmacokinetic model in order to establish a basis for dosage recommendations in adjunctive therapies”
raw.observations: After validation, gender ceased to be relevant as a covariate on CL. Validation provides evidence for the appropriateness of the adjusted model. Inducers only slightly reduce the clearance reducing impact of VPA
raw.dose: Single, multiple and steady-state oral doses in patients
raw.structure: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination
raw.equations: CL/F=(theta1+theta2*WT)*(1+theta3*BAL)*(1+theta4*VPA)*(1+eta1) Vd/F=theta6*WT*(1+eta2) Ka=theta7*(1+eta3) Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) BAL=comedication with valproate and any inducer (yes=1, no=0) VPA=comedication with valproate alone (yes=1, no=0)
raw.parameter_values: theta1= 1.158 theta2=0.03588 theta3=-0.605 theta4=-0.772 theta5=not used theta6=2.12 theta7=1.09 omega1=0.104 omega2=0.611 omega3=1.17 sigma1=0.0583
raw.validation: No / Yes (paper is validation of previous model)

extraction_target.title: Validation of a population pharmacokinetic model for adjunctive lamotrigine therapy in children.

structural_model.description: 1 compartment with linear absorption and elimination

omega.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending
Appendix NONMEM-scale OMEGA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

sigma.conversion: Appendix NONMEM-scale SIGMA value retained verbatim; source-paper verification pending

extraction_target.residual_error: CL/F=(theta1+theta2*WT)*(1+theta3*BAL)*(1+theta4*VPA)*(1+eta1) Vd/F=theta6*WT*(1+eta2) Ka=theta7*(1+eta3) Cobs=Cipred*(1+eps1) BAL=comedication with valproate and any inducer (yes=1, no=0) VPA=comedication with valproate alone (yes=1, no=0)
extraction_target.notes: Appendix-derived silver reference; compare with the publication before promotion to a gold tier.

study.dose: Single, multiple and steady-state oral doses in patients
study.objective: “to validate a previously developed paediatric population pharmacokinetic model in order to establish a basis for dosage recommendations in adjunctive therapies”

validation.raw: No / Yes (paper is validation of previous model)

normalization.omega: Values labelled OMEGA in the appendix are retained as NONMEM variances; no CV reconversion is applied.
normalization.eta: ETA distribution is inferred only when the appendix equation explicitly uses exp(ETA) or additive ETA.
normalization.source_text: The appendix row is preserved verbatim in raw; normalized fields never replace it.
